name: Fable
description: Fable — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

seo.title: Fable — Accessibility / A11y Testing
seo.meta_description: Fable: Fable — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

when_to_use: Disability community usability testing for mobile app
Accessibility QA sessions with real screen-reader users
AT compatibility testing included in pre-launch checklist
VoiceOver and TalkBack flows validated by disabled testers
Structured feedback from assistive technology users on new feature

pros: Access to trained testers with disabilities on demand
Combines usability insight with a11y expertise
cons: Per-engagement pricing adds up across teams
Panel size smaller than mainstream UX panels
Requires research process maturity to leverage
review.verdict: Best-in-class panel for testing with disabled users, but pair it with automated tools for full WCAG coverage.
review.best_for: Enterprises running inclusive research with disabled users alongside audits.
review.not_for: Dev teams just wanting automated axe-style scans in CI.
